Title: KENNEDY SPACE CENTER, FLA. -  Dr. Anthony J. Catanese, president of the Florida Institute of Technology in Melbourne, Fla., delivers the opening remarks at the university's Columbia Village dedication ceremony.  The event is attended by family members of the STS-107 astronauts, other dignitaries, members of the university community and the public.  Each of the seven new residence halls in the complex is named for one of the STS-107 astronauts who perished during the Columbia accident -- Rick Husband, Willie McCool, Laurel Clark, Michael Anderson, David Brown, Kalpana Chawla, and Ilan Ramon.
CreditLine: NASA Image and Video Library (public domain)
